description:
A refined fork of EarTrumpet with enhanced volume control and music overlay

BetterTrumpet is a refined fork of EarTrumpet, the beloved Windows volume mixer. Features include enhanced volume control, a slick music overlay, fully customizable colors, and a cleaner interface.
Version 3.2.0 delivers a redesigned acrylic media popup with smoother seeking and per-app volume, persistent hard mute, improved monitored-device session grouping, tray and changelog polish, and configurable volume tick feedback.
